top_tweets.text:
We've redesigned Copilot to be simpler, faster, and more intuitive, to help keep you in the flow of your work. 

Try it out: https://t.co/iBuMPZ6L4b
top_tweets.author: satyanadella
top_tweets.name: Satya Nadella
top_tweets.summary_zh: 微軟發布重新設計的 Copilot，主打更簡潔、快速與直覺的介面，幫助用戶保持工作流暢度。

top_tweets.text:
Since the rise of AI

Copyright is fucked
Cyber security is fucked
Open source is fucked
Privacy is fucked
Jobs are fucked
Thinking is fucked
SaaS market is fucked
Design is fucked

At the cost of what?
top_tweets.author: marcba
top_tweets.name: Marc Backes
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者認為 AI 興起後，版權、資安、開源、隱私、就業、思考、SaaS 市場與設計都遭受衝擊，質疑這些代價是否值得。討論串中不少人贊同或補充各領域的具體影響。

top_tweets.text: I work 9-5 in an office. Shops open from 9-5. Appointments run from 9-5. Banks close at 4 pm. Everyone is only available when I'm not. I can't go to your shop, the bank, or book anything without taking time off work. Why did we design society like this?
top_tweets.author: OrevaZSN
top_tweets.name: 𐌁𐌉Ᏽ 𐌕𐌉𐌌𐌉
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者指出現代社會運作時間設計的矛盾：朝九晚五上班，但商店、銀行、預約服務也都只在工作時段營業，導致必須請假才能處理日常事務。

top_tweets.text:
I Went From $3,000/Month on Claude to $5/Week on DeepSeek

And honestly? 80% of my work is identical.

For the past two months, I was burning $3-5K monthly on Claude Code. Every idea from design to development to testing - full end-to-end automation, even simulating users to test
top_tweets.author: quxiaoyin
top_tweets.name: Xiaoyin Qu
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者從每月 3000 美元的 Claude 訂閱改用每週 5 美元的 DeepSeek，發現 80% 工作成果相同，涵蓋設計到開發到測試的全流程自動化。

top_tweets.text: A Japanese design firm Kenji Abe has designed a glass beer bottle that you can actually stick into the sand on the beach 👀 https://t.co/nZ2XMvR5Jn
top_tweets.author: ReddCinema
top_tweets.name: Redd
top_tweets.summary_zh: 日本設計公司 Kenji Abe 設計出可插入沙灘的玻璃啤酒瓶，展現產品設計的使用情境創新思維。

top_tweets.text: Microsoft has introduced a new design for Copilot https://t.co/Bxdg6dKbfZ
top_tweets.author: avstorm
top_tweets.name: Andreas Storm
top_tweets.summary_zh: 微軟為 Copilot 推出新設計介面。

top_tweets.text:
Siri finally went from RGB setup light to actual Apple Design

Thank you Apple for getting rid of that ugly glow.. it looks infinitely cleaner now https://t.co/8uoBOVSq9T
top_tweets.author: TheAppleDesign
top_tweets.name: Apple Design
top_tweets.summary_zh: 蘋果將 Siri 視覺設計從 RGB 光效改為更符合品牌風格的簡潔設計，用戶普遍認為新版更乾淨俐落。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Parastore
top_products.author: KYEONGEOP LIM
top_products.tagline: Simulate real store with LLM-powered synthetic consumer
top_products.summary_zh: 使用 LLM 驅動的合成消費者來模擬真實商店環境，幫助零售業者測試商業策略與消費者行為。

top_products.title: NeuralAgent 2.5
top_products.author: Khaled Shadid
top_products.tagline: Talk to your computer, it responds and gets things done.
top_products.summary_zh: 透過語音對話控制電腦並執行任務的智能助理工具，適合需要提升工作效率的使用者。

top_products.title: Buffer API
top_products.author: Andrew Yates
top_products.tagline: One API to publish across every social platform.
top_products.summary_zh: 提供單一 API 介面即可發佈內容到所有社群媒體平台，簡化社群媒體管理流程。

top_products.title: Robinhood Agentic Trading
top_products.author: Chris Messina
top_products.summary_zh: 讓 AI 代理人自動執行股票交易的功能，為 Robinhood 用戶提供自動化投資選項。

top_products.title: Compartment
top_products.author: Vladimir Lugovsky
top_products.tagline: Open-source runtime for internal team software
top_products.summary_zh: 開源的運行環境，專為團隊內部軟體工具的部署與管理而設計。

top_products.title: LaunchOS
top_products.author: Jimmy Cheung
top_products.tagline: Bring Back the Classic Launchpad Experience on macOS 26+
top_products.summary_zh: 在 macOS 26+ 系統上恢復經典 Launchpad 使用體驗的工具。
